sacred_logistics.0359383749a6355b.title: &bEnergy
sacred_logistics.alexs_mobs.quests1.desc: &6Void Worm Mandibles&r drop from the &aVoid Worm&r.
sacred_logistics.alexs_mobs.quests2.desc: &6Void Worm Eyes&r drop from the &aVoid Worm&r.
sacred_logistics.alexs_mobs.quests4.desc: A &6Shattered Dimensional Carver&r is a dangerous artifact.
sacred_logistics.alexs_mobs.quests5.desc: &6Blood Sprayer&r shoots a stream of blood.
sacred_logistics.alexs_mobs.quests8.desc: &6Crimson Mosquito Larva&r can be crafted by combining a &aMaggot&r and a &aProboscis&r.
sacred_logistics.alexs_mobs.quests9.desc: &6Mysterious Worm&r is spawned from the &aCrimson Mosquito Larva&r in &aCapsid&r.
sacred_logistics.alexs_mobs.quests15.sub: A cube? In my cube game?
sacred_logistics.alexs_mobs.quests16.des: The &6Shield of the Deep&r is a great combat tool.
sacred_logistics.alexs_mobs.quests17.des: &6Shark Tooth&r drops from the &aHammerhead Shark&r while it eats a fish or a squid.
sacred_logistics.alexs_mobs.quests18.des: &6Serrated Shark Tooth&r drops from the &aFrilled Shark&r while it eats a fish or a squid.
sacred_logistics.alexs_mobs.quests19.des: Slay a &6Hammerhead Shark&r and a &6Frilled Shark&r.
sacred_logistics.alexs_mobs.quests30.sub: Don't confuse it with an Alligator!
sacred_logistics.alexs_mobs.quests34.sub: There's more where this came from!
sacred_logistics.alexs_mobs.quests35.des: &6Cave Centipede Leggings&r allow you to climb walls.
sacred_logistics.alexs_mobs.title: &bNew Mobs
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests0.descr: &6Umbrella&r is an artifact that can be used in combat like a shield, or like a planner while you travel. One item, two uses!
It can be found in the &2treasuries&r of various dungeons.
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests1.descr: &6Everlasting Beef&r is a food that can be eaten an infinite amount of times.
It can be obtained after slaying a cow with a small chance.
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests2.descr: &6Eternal Steak&r is a fried everlasting beef. It can also be eaten an infinite number of times, but the steak restores more hunger and saturation.
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests3.descr: &6Plastic Drinking Hat&r is an artifact that allows you to eat and drink faster.
It can be found in the &2treasuries&r of various dungeons.
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests3.subti: I'm not sure if that's useful...
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests4.descr: &6Novelty Drinking Hat&r is an artifact that allows you to eat and drink faster.
It can be found in the &2treasuries&r of various dungeons.
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests4.subti: I'm not sure if that's useful...
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests5.descr: &6Snorkel&r is an artifact that allows its owner to breathe under water. This makes the exploration of water depths more safe and convenient.
It can be found in the &2treasuries&r of various dungeons.
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests5.subti: Great if you love the ocean!
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests6.descr: &6Night Vision Goggless&r is an artifact that gives you the ability to see in the dark. The night is no longer dark and scary...
It can be found in the &2treasuries&r of various dungeons.
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests7.descr: &6Villager Hat&r is an artifact that gives you additional discounts when trading with villagers.
It can be found in the &2treasuries&r of various dungeons.
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests8.descr: &6Superstitious Hat&r is an artifact that gives you an additional level of looting when killing mobs.
It can be found in the &2treasuries&r of various dungeons.
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests9.descr: &6Lucky Scarft&r is an artifact that gives its owner an additional level of luck, which allows you to more profitably mine various resources.
It can be found in the &2treasuries&r of various dungeons.
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests10.desc: &6Scarf of Invisibility&r is an artifact that hides you from curious eyes.
It can be found in the &2treasuries&r of various dungeons.
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests11.desc: &6Cross Necklace&r is an artifact that increases the duration of invincibility after taking damage.
It can be found in the &2treasuries&r of various dungeons.
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests12.desc: &6Panic Necklace&r is an artifact that increases your speed after receiving damage. A fairly useful artifact that will help to fight more effectively and retreat after taking serious damage.
It can be found in the &2treasuries&r of various dungeons.
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests13.desc: &6Shock Pendant&r is an artifact that can shock your enemies.
It can be found in the &2treasuries&r of various dungeons.
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests14.desc: &6Flame Pendant&r is an artifact that can set your enemies on fire.
It can be found in the &2treasuries&r of various dungeons.
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests15.desc: &6Thorn Pendant&r is an artifact that can damage your enemies.
It can be found in the &2treasuries&r of various dungeons.
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests16.desc: &6Charm of Sinking&r is an artifact that allows you to move freely underwater.
It can be found in the &2treasuries&r of various dungeons.
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests17.desc: &6Cloud in a Bottle&r is an artifact that provides you with a double jump, making your movement around the world faster and more convenient.
It can be found in the &2treasuries&r of various dungeons.
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests18.desc: &6Obsidian Skull&r is an artifact that gives you temporary invulnerability from fire.
It can be found in the &2treasuries&r of various dungeons.
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests18.subt: I wonder who used to own it?
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests19.desc: &6Antidote Vessel&r is an artifact that reduces the duration of negative effects, allowing you to survive longer in fights, especially against witches.
It can be found in the &2treasuries&r of various dungeons.
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests20.desc: &6Universal Attractor&r is an artifact that attracts nearby object to you, making your life a little easier.
It can be found in the &2treasuries&r of various dungeons.
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests20.subt: Could be one of the most useful artifacts!
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests21.desc: &6Crystal Heart&r is an artifact that gives you additional health, thus improving survivability.
It can be found in the &2treasuries&r of various dungeons.
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests22.desc: &6Helium Flamingo&r is an artifact that allows you to swim through air for a limited time! To do this, you need to go into the water, wait until Flamingo is charged, and then start swimming in the water and fly out of it into the air. Incredible!
It can be found in the &2treasuries&r of various dungeons.
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests23.desc: &6Digging Claws&r is an item that increases your basic mining level and mining speed in general, making your life a little easier.
It can be found in the &2treasuries&r of various dungeons.
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests24.desc: &6Feral Claws&r is an artifact that increases your attack speed, improving the total damage.
It can be found in the &2treasuries&r of various dungeons.
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests25.desc: &6Power Glove&r is an artifact that gives you 4 additional damage when fighting.
It can be found in the &2treasuries&r of various dungeons.
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests26.desc: &6Fire Gauntlet&r is an artifact that sets the mobs you attack on fire. The main rule when wearing this artifact is not to set fire to yourself.
It can be found in the &2treasuries&r of various dungeons.
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests26.subt: Just don't set yourself on fire!
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests27.desc: &6Pocket Piston&r is an artifact that increases the knockback you inflict on mobs.
It can be found in the &2treasuries&r of various dungeons.
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests28.desc: &6Vampiric Glove&r is an artifact that will restore your health when damaging the enemy.
It can be found in the &2treasuries&r of various dungeons.
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests29.desc: &6Golden Hook&r is an artifact that increases the amount of experience mobs drop.
It can be found in the &2treasuries&r of various dungeons.
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests30.desc: &6Aqua Dashers&r is an artifact that allows you to walk above the surface of various liquids, although it only works when you're sprinting.
It can be found in the &2treasuries&r of various dungeons.
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests31.desc: &6Bunny Hoppers&r is an artifact that increases your jump height, and also completely removes fall damage.
It can be found in the &2treasuries&r of various dungeons.
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests32.desc: &6Kitty Slippers&r is an artifact which scares creepers off. Finally, you don't have to worry about unexpected explosions from behind.
It can be found in the &2treasuries&r of various dungeons.
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests32.subt: Quite cute, but not for everyone!
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests33.desc: &6Running Shoes&r is an artifact that increases your speed, probably because they are very comfortable.
It can be found in the &2treasuries&r of various dungeons.
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests34.desc: &6Steadfast Spikes&r is an artifact that absorbs the knockback you receive, making it great for combat.
It can be found in the &2treasuries&r of various dungeons.
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests35.desc: &6Flippers&r is an artifact that increases your speed in the water, making you faster under the layers of water.
It can be found in the &2treasuries&r of various dungeons.
sacred_logistics.artifacts.quests36.desc: &6Whoopee Cushion&r is an artifact that is guaranteed to increase the amount of fun you will have playing.
It can be found in the &2treasuries&r of various dungeons.
sacred_logistics.artifacts.title: &bArtifacts
sacred_logistics.b.quests0.description1: 2. When in the Nether, you will be set on fire every 15 seconds, unless you're wearing the fire gauntlet!
sacred_logistics.b.quests0.description2: 3. You can't trade with clerics without a cross necklace!
sacred_logistics.b.quests0.description3: 4. Villagers will panic around you, unless you're wearing a villager hat!
sacred_logistics.b.quests0.description4: 5. You can't go to space(any planets and stations) without the coin of fortune!
sacred_logistics.b.quests0.description5: 6. Wither can only be summoned if you have glowing water in your inventory!
sacred_logistics.b.quests0.description6: 7. To access the End, you will need the hero's medallion and the angelic feather, as well as the Ender Hand!
sacred_logistics.b.quests0.description7: 8. To travel between dimensions, you need to own the spatial sign!
sacred_logistics.b.quests0.subtitle: Better read this
sacred_logistics.b.quests0.tasks0.title: Important mechanics!
sacred_logistics.b.title: &bInfo
sacred_logistics.chipped.title: &bDecoration
sacred_logistics.relics.quests0.descript: The &6Research Table&r allows you to learn about various &aRelics&r, as well as upgrading their powerful abilities.
sacred_logistics.relics.quests0.subtitle: Relic research!

sacred_logistics.relics.title: &bRelics
sacred_logistics.reliquary.quests0.descr: &6Alckahestry Tome&r is a relic that accumulates a charge of Redstone or Glowstone dust in order to double almost any resources.
To &2Activate&r a relic you need to hold &eSHIFT&r and then click &eRMB&r, making it so it automatically absorbs and glow/red stone from your inventory.
To &2Double&r any resources, you have to put a relic in the crafting grid alongside the resource you want. This will double the resource, but drain some power from the tome.
sacred_logistics.reliquary.quests0.subti: There is a risk of balance loss!
sacred_logistics.reliquary.quests1.descr: &6Angelic Feather&r is a relic that saves its owner from falling off a big height by absorbing the damage and consuming owner's hunger. Also gives permanent jump boost.
sacred_logistics.reliquary.quests2.descr: &6Cross of Mercy&r is a relic that causes additional damage against undead, and also has an increased level of looting.
In addition, it is made out of gold, therefore it is more enchantable, but has less durability. Therefore, it's better to use it alongside the &2Touchstone of Midas&r.
sacred_logistics.reliquary.quests2.subti: Undead hates this one simple trick!
sacred_logistics.reliquary.quests3.descr: &6Aphrodite's Serum&r is a relic that contributes to the reproduction of animals if it is thrown next to them.
sacred_logistics.reliquary.quests4.descr: &6Angelheart Vial&r is a relic that breaks when the owner dies, healing them and giving temporary buffs in return.
sacred_logistics.reliquary.quests4.subti: It looks like a totem of immortality!
sacred_logistics.reliquary.quests5.descr: &6Rending Gale&r is a relic that allows its owner to fly in the direction of the camera. Keep in mind that it does not cancel the fall damage, unless you look at the ground and use the relic to land safely.
The Rending Gale also can &2attract&r or &2repel&r creatures, or spawn a &alightning&r during a thunderstorm.
You can &2Switch&r between these modes by using a combination of keys &eSHIFT&r + &eLMB&r.
And in order to fly or to spawn lightnings, the relic must be &2charged&r with &afeathers&r.
sacred_logistics.reliquary.quests5.subti: A relic that allows you to fly!
sacred_logistics.reliquary.quests6.descr: &6Emperor Chalice&r is a relic which serves as an endless source of water. in addition to that, you can drink from the chalice to restore hunger by sacrificing health.
sacred_logistics.reliquary.quests7.descr: &6Infernal Chalice&r is a relic that can store lava inside, and also protects its owner from lava and fire in exchange for hunger.
sacred_logistics.reliquary.quests8.descr: &6Magicbane&r is a relic that only has &e16&r durability and is one of the most easily broken weapons that exists in this modpack.
When hit by this blade, there is a&e50%&r chance of imposing one of the following effects: &nConfusion&r, &nBlindness&r, &nSlowness&r, &nWeakness&r.
In addition, if you apply any &2Enchanting&r on the blade, then the level of the enchantment will be added to the relic's &atotal damage&r.
For example, a Magicbane enchanted with fire aspect 2 will have &e2&r additional damage.
It is formally &2golden&r, so the Touchstone of Midas works, and so that it has the same enchantability as gold.
NOTE: &0Magicbane is an artifact from a game called Nethack, which the author of this mod would like to tribute a bit.
sacred_logistics.reliquary.quests9.descr: &6Coin of Fortune&r is a relic that attracts items and experience orbs within a radius of 5 blocks to its owner. It is toggleable via a combination of keys &eShift&r + &eRMB.&r
The radius of the relic can be &2tripled&r. To do this, click &eRMB&r with the relic in the hand, which will change the radius to around 15 blocks.
sacred_logistics.reliquary.quests10.desc: &6Sojourner Staff&r is a relic that absorbs up to &e1500&r torches, and then places them at a great distance.
This relic can be used to place torches/blocks at a distance of up to &e30&r blocks, but at the same time, every &e6&r blocks increases the number of torches/blocks spent by 1.
For example, by placing a torch at a distance of &e30&r Blocks, the relic owner will spend &e6&r torches at once.
If you have both the &6Sojourner Staff&r and the &6Lantern of Paranoia&r, the latter will try to use the internal storage of the staff in order to place the torches.
sacred_logistics.reliquary.quests11.desc: &6Ender Staff&r is a relic that facilitates travel. When you press &eSHIFT&r + &eRMB&r, the relic will begin absorbing Ender pearls to charge. Afterwards, it can spend this charge to teleport its owner. This relic has &2several modes&r that can be switched by pressing &eSHIFT&r + &eLMB&r.
In the &lShort Distance&r mode (an ender pearl icon) the relic will launch a completely ordinary ender pearl, but landing will not inflict damage to its owner.

In the &lLong Distance&r mode (an ender eye icon) the relic will launch a ender pearl that will be less subject to gravity, which contributes to a larger distance of the flight of pearl and, therefore, teleportation of the owner.
In the &lGhost Node&r mode , it teleports the owner to a &2Gost Node&r, to which the staff is tied. To tie the relic to a node, you just need to click &eRMB&r in the same mode.
sacred_logistics.reliquary.quests12.desc: &6Pyromancer's Staff&r is a relic that shoots fire balls, similar to those that ghasts and blazes use. It is charged with blaze powder or fire charges.
In addition, it &2prevents&r the owner from being hit by fireballs sent by blazes or ghats. It will also extinguish flames around the owner, but only when it's turned off.
And finally, Pyromancer Staff &2will replace&r its owner's &2Flint and Steel&r.
sacred_logistics.reliquary.quests13.desc: &6Ice Magus Rod&r is a relic that absorbs (&eSHIFT&r + &eRMB&r) snowballs from the inventory of its owner and shoots them at the enemy. It is more effective against opponents from the &cNether&r.
sacred_logistics.reliquary.quests14.desc: But the Glacial Staff also has an &2additional ability&r - it turns water into dense ice, and lava into obsididan, if the owner holds the staff in his hand. These blocks melt when they are outside the radius of the action of the staff.
sacred_logistics.reliquary.quests14.subt: An improved version of the Ice Magus Rod!
sacred_logistics.reliquary.quests15.desc: &6Infernal Tear&r is a relic that consumes (&eSHIFT&r + &eRMB&r) items that the owner has the most of in their inventory, and exchanges them for experience.
sacred_logistics.reliquary.quests15.subt: It loves a large number of items!
sacred_logistics.reliquary.quests16.desc: &6Hero Medallion&r is a relic that stores experience. When activating the relic, it will absorb the experience of its owner. If it is not activated, then by pressing the RMB will return 1 level of experience to the owner.
sacred_logistics.reliquary.quests17.desc: &6Pheonix Down&r is a relic that can resurrect its owner after a deadly blow, while giving them fully restored health and many positive effects.
After using the relic, it turns back into an &2Angel Feather&r.
sacred_logistics.reliquary.quests17.subt: An improved version of the totem of immortality!
sacred_logistics.reliquary.quests18.desc: &6Infernal Claws&r is a relic that absorbs fire damage, except for lava, by taking owner's hunger.
sacred_logistics.reliquary.quests19.desc: &6Kraken Shell&r is a relic that absorbs the drowning damage, but uses owner's hunger for this.
sacred_logistics.reliquary.quests19.subt: It will come in handy under the water surface!
sacred_logistics.reliquary.quests20.desc: &6Touchstone of Midas&r is a relic that restores the durability of gold items by using glowstone from the owner's inventory.
sacred_logistics.reliquary.title: &bMagical Doodads
sacred_logistics.0ba093f3620bfef6.quests: First thing first, I need a &6Fluid Bath&r and a &6Wooden Stirring Stick&r.
Using these, I can mix several items and fluids together to get something new.
Time to get dirty...
Mixing stuff
Silt is going to be the start of my &6Engineering&r path. I will need a sturdy building material - such as &7Silt Bricks&r.
&oAll I need is to mix &r&eSand&r, &8Gravel&r and &3Water&r in a fluid bath.
A pretty disappointing thing for an epic start
Getting Silt
Time to get my hands on a grinder! &fTitanium&r should work...
I will also need some &6copper&r and &bdiamond&r plates, as well as the &silt bricks&r.
Manual Grinding
Great, I can now grind &6Raw Iron&r into &fIron Dust&r! And then mix it into &3Iron Silt&r.
Iron Dust
By smelting the &3Iron Silt&r I get a new material - &fPure Iron&r.
Great, I can now grind &6Raw Gold&r into &6Gold Dust&r! And then mix it into &6Gold Silt&r.
Gold Dust
By smelting the &6Gold Silt&r I get a new material - &6Pure Gold&r.
With some &6Gold&r and &fTitanium&r I can get a new blade, which I can use to crush &8Coal&r into dust, which will be needed to make &8Steel&r.
A new blade
This  &fStirring Stick&r allows me to mix hot fluids, such as &6lava&r.
And finally, &fIron&r and &8Coal&r dust can be turned into &8Steel&r. A new age starts here!
Steel Ingots
Steel Age
I doubt I would need a new stirring stick or a blade anytime soon, but I could make better ones using steel anyway...
With the power of steel, I can finally craft a crank that allows me to generate kinetic energy.
Kinetic energy
I can now get a better grinder!
&bNote: place the crank to the left of the grinder, and a chest to the right.&r
My next goal would be a &6Fluid Tank&r. But first, I need a bit of planks.
And now to actually make the tank...
The new &6Kinetic Mixer&r is much more efficient, and can also work with high temperatures.
It works just like the grinder, but also needs a fluid tank at the bottom. Consider getting a steel tank if you want to mix something with lava.
A new mixer
With this fancy grinder, I can cut a &6Steel Block&r into &6Steel Rods&r.
I can use steel rods to craft a steel hammer, which is more efficient at crafting plates.
I can also make pure iron plates.
With a few plates and a stick, I can finally create a gear.
By crystallizing &8Coal&r and &4Redstone&r dust, I can get an empowered coal crystal.
The gearbox can generate kinetic energy from empowered coal and automatically transfer it to the next block. To place it down - use shift+RMB on the next block.
And the charger will charge crank-powered tools. For it to work, I need to place a chest above the charger and put my tools inside.
Using gears and rods, I can get new fancy &6Crank-Powered Tools&r!
My new pickaxe can finally mine black granite, though I will have to visit the Nether.
&bBlack granite can also be obtained from meteorites.&r
And now, I can get some basic pipes which will transfer electricity.
This mechanism converts kinetic energy into the electrical one, which is a massive step forward!
I have gained enough resources to go into the electrical age. Time to get an upgrade!
The purifier can turn &8Gravel&r, &eSand&r and &8Steel&r into a new material - &7Pure Steel&r.
I need to keep moving forward, and a steel gear sounds like a good start!
My next goal is a smelter of some sorts, and for that I will need a conduction machine component.
I will also need a temperature regulator, which will get me closer to the alloy smelter!
Though that does mean that I have to find magma somewhere...
Combining mystium blend the electrified gold blend, I can create a truly legendary alloy...
&o&5The union of magic and technology will lead to great progress!&r
The alloy smelter allows me to get some mystium blend - the best of both technological and magical worlds.
Gold can be energized using redstone dust.
Now I just have to crush it into dust...
This compressor can make plates more efficiently.
A new age is coming, and I should thinking about switching to better materials, such as energized gold.
&bAllthemodium
&bAllthemodium Ingot
&bTeleport Pad
sacred_logistics.0ba093f3620bfef6.title: &bBasic Technology
sacred_logistics.1bacec0478c39c53.title: &bAutomatization
sacred_logistics.2a172dd20bd67159.quests: Metallurgic infuser can infuse things with various elements.
Infused alloy is a crafting component used in many things, such as energy tablets or reinforced alloys.
Infused Alloy
Basic control unit is a crafting component used in many things, such as the jetpack.
Basic Control Unit
Reinforced Alloy is a crafting component used in many things, such as atomic alloy.
Reinforced Alloy
Atomic alloy is a crafting component used in many things, such as the atomic disassembler or the Robit.
Atomic Alloy
The enrichment chamber can enrich some materials, as well as be turned into the pressurized reaction chamber!
A simple crusher which can be used to create biofuel.
The atomic disassembler is a cheap and fast mining tool.
Robit can be crafted into the digital miner.
What a cutie :3
Digital miner can mine ores from the underground.
Biofuel can be turned into substrate or burned in a bio-generator.
Biofuel
The PRC can create a low of things, but you will most likely use it for plutonium pellets or substrate.
Substrate can be turned into HDPE pellets or used to get more substrate, though you will also need ethylene and water.
Substrate
Plutonium pellets are useful for a lot of high tech things.
Plutonium Pellet
HDPE pellets can be turned into sheets and rods.
HDPE Pellets
HDPE sheets are used to craft solar neutron activator and the MekaSuit.
HDPE Sheet
Elytras with extra durability.
The solar neutron activator can create polonium and tritium.
Polonium can be used to create something similar to the ME system!
Polonium Pellets
Antimatter can transform certain items or be used for crafts.
Antimatter Pellets
Antiprotonic nucleosynthesizer uses antimatter to transform certain items. It also has a terrible name.
Modification station is used to kit out your MekaSuit.
A great set of armor :)
A great set of armor :)
A great set of armor :)
A great set of armor :)
A better version of the same mechanism.
Time for an upgrade!
A better version of the same mechanism.
Time for an upgrade!

sacred_logistics.2a172dd20bd67159.title: &bA New Breakthrough
sacred_logistics.03fcb517c4e407cf.quests: Мой путь к &5звездам&r начинается здесь, на Земле, с создания &6Верстака ракет&r и &6Пусковой площадки&r. Создав эти блоки я смогу, наконец, шагнуть в сторону космической эры.
sacred_logistics.03fcb517c4e407cf.title: &bThe Main Adventure
sacred_logistics.04e59b8dc02e532b.quests: If I want to make decent &3food&r, I will need a &6Cobblestone Stove&r. I can put &6cookware&r on top and use it to &2cook&r.
To make one, I will need: 5 &7cobblestone&r, 1 &ecampfire&r and 3 &7iron ingots&r. And, of course, a &aCrafting Table&r.
We need to cook!
Once I'm done, I will also need to &3craft&r a &6Pot&r and a &6Pan&r, a decent starting kit. After placing them on top of my stove, I can start making really &2tasty&r and &esaturating&r food.
For a pot, I will need: 5 &ccopper ingots&r and 1 &6wooden shovel&r. And, of course, a &acrafting table&r.
For a pan, I will need: 4 &ccopper ingots&r and 1 &6stick&r. And, of course, a &acrafting table&r.
After I get both, I can finally get started with cooking &2incredible&r food!
Time to become a chef!
&bCookware
Since I'm done with the basics, I can now make &6Chocolate&r! Finally, something sweet :) Although it also has &3other uses&r. To start cooking it, I will have to use my pot.
I can check the recipes in my recipe book, that can be accessed by using any of the cookware. It shows the thing I can make in my inventory, handy!
Chocolate can be eaten on it's own, but I could improve it by making a &6Chocolate Box&r, a &6Tart&r or a &6spread&r.
Sounds tasty!
I hope you have a sweet tooth
To cook various jams, I will have to make a &6Small Cooking Pot&r. To use it, I &3have&r to put it on top of the stove, drop the &3ingridients&r in and wait.
It will definitely come in handy!
Some more cookware!
With some chocolate and my new cooking pot, I can make some &6Chocolate Spread&r.
It can be placed down for decoration, or used to make rolls or sandwiches!
Yummy!
Sweet life
I can pack some chocolate into a &6box&r for convenience. To actually eat, I should put it on top of a table(or anywhere, really), so I can &3snack&r on it without interrupting my other business.
Every box has 6 pieces in total. After they are all gone, the box will disappear.
Even sweeter!
That jams, man!
&6Wine Bottles&r are very important for &3winemaking&r. I can't enjoy the wine without having anything to &3pour&r it in, now can I?
They are easily made on a crafting table, though I might need to get some sand...
The most important wine ingredient!
This pot allows me to turn grape vines into grape juice to further turn it into wine. All I need to do is put a vine inside, jump on top of it and bottle the juice!.
Red Grape Juice
White Grape Juice
Grape Juice
Red Grapes
White Grapes
Drinks
Cheese Wheel
Piece of Cheese

Since I have all the necessary cookware, I can make a lot of new food. Alright, right now I want to cook, hmm... a &6Roastbeef with carrots&r, &6Cooked beef&r, &6Chicken Alfredo&r, and &6Broccoli with steak&r.
Variety matters!
Delicious Food
Now I can make even more delicious food. This time, I want to make... some &6Pasta with Broccoli&r and &6Pasta with Bolognese&r.
Yum!
This world needs more nice food!
More Delicious Food
After making tomato soup and boiled beef, I can start making &6Bolognese&r. It's a &3great&r dish, so I really want to try it!
I hope it turns out great!
Delicious!
After creating a pot, I can cook new hearty meals - the &6Tomato Soup&r and the &6Mushroom Soup&r. To start cooking, I need to put a pot on the stove.
But I'm in no hurry to eat these soups, as I can use them to cook other stuff. Such as the &6Pasta with tomato sauce&r or &6Beef Wellington&r, both of which are great.
Helps with stomach ache...
Soups

After making tomato soup and mushroom soup, I can create &3new&r types of food. Namely, &6Pasta with tomato sauce&r and &6Beef Wellington&r. For Beef Wellington, I will need a &3frying pan&r. It also needs to be placed on the stove.
Quite a filling meal!
Delicacies
After creating a small pot, I can cook &6Chocolate Truffle&r.
Although it's not very filling, when I eat it, I can move a little faster. I can also use it to create other items and cook various foods.
Chocolate truffles can be made into a Box of Chocolate, brown dye, as well as Chocolate Spray or Chocolate Tart.
A new kind of chocolate!
After making chocolate truffles, I can create a &6Box of Chocolate&r. I can put it somewhere and &3eat chocolate&r in &3pieces&r.
To create a box of chocolates, I need to combine 8 pieces of chocolate truffle and a chest on the workbench.
A New Box of Chocolate!
sacred_logistics.04e59b8dc02e532b.title: &bCooking
sacred_logistics.5e53a9bc0eda6e5d.quests: After gathering some wood and processing it into planks, I can create my first and main workbench - the &6Crafting Table&r.
&bUnlocks access to crafting a huge number of items.&r
&6Cobblestone&r - my first type of hard stone - will allow me to create a &2Furnace&r.
The &6Furnace&r is needed to smelt various resources.
By creating a stone pickaxe, I can mine a new resource - &6Iron&r.
I can smelt iron ore into iron ingots.
I can turn iron ingots into plates to create an &6Iron Pickaxe&r.
An improved pickaxe that allows me to mine new resources - &6Gold&r and &6Diamonds&r.
An improved version of the regular backpack.
&6A backpack&r is necessary for storing resources while traveling.
&6A wooden pickaxe&r will allow me to mine normal rock, namely &2cobblestone&r.
&6Stone&r is needed to craft better tools.
&6Stone Pickaxe&r allows me to mine faster.
The first thing I need to do in this world is to obtain &6Wood&r.
&bTrees grow almost everywhere, so I only need to look around to find one.&r
By creating a stone pickaxe, I can obtain a new resource - &6Copper&r.
I can smelt copper ore into copper bars.
An improved version of regular chests and barrels.
The copper furnace melts a little faster than the regular one.
I need a copper hammer to craft various plates.
Must be carried in inventory to prevent meteorites from falling.
sacred_logistics.5e53a9bc0eda6e5d.title: &bFirst Steps
sacred_logistics.6dc1575ce1e3bfe4.title: &bObtaining Resources
sacred_logistics.26c0412d42d0bccb.quests: &7Welcome to &6Sacred Logistics&7. The modpack was developed by the &6BMProjects&7 team, the authors are: &6BarMaxx&7 and &6HollowHorizon&7.&r

&7You are an &6Engineer&7 who has decided to conquer this unknown world using Technology. But as you progress, you encounter Mythology and Magic, which are inextricably linked to the conquest of this world. Now, in order to study various structures and dimensions and interact with the world, you need to create and use various relics and artifacts. In addition, the world of the modpack is based on &6global events&7 - some of your actions will change the world, thus unlocking new possibilities. But nothing can stop you, as your main goal is to conquer the entire &6Universe&7, and you must complete this task. &aGood luck&7!&r
A new start for a few modpack!
sacred_logistics.26c0412d42d0bccb.title: &bIntroduction
sacred_logistics.686a5f68a3da8ab9.quests: Dragons can now be found in the world. Strange creatures...
But, unfortunately, I have to kill a few to continue developing my technology!
&bYou must kill a real dragon from the IceAndFire mod.&r
Did I really get the Heart of a real &6Fire Dragon&r...
&bThe Heart can be obtained after killing the dragon.&r
Did I really get the Heart of the real &6Lightning Dragon&r...
&bThe heart can be obtained after killing the dragon.&r
Did I really get the Heart of the real &6Ice Dragon&r...
&bThe heart can be obtained after killing the dragon.&r
To create an attuned titanium ingot, I must insert the following upgrade: &6Enhanced Filtering&r.
Ancient debris appears in the Nether at an altitude of 7-22. But it is very rare, so be patient.
With the help of a netherite ingot, I can upgrade some items, such as armor, tools, chests, etc.
Good and effective tools and weapons.
An improved version of the diamond backpack. Allows you to store more items and upgrades.
To spawn the Wither, you need to place 4 blocks of soul sand and 3 Wither skeleton skulls as shown in the picture. Kill this boss to get the Nether Star!
&Nether Star&f drops from the Wither. This is a very valuable item that you will need in large quantities in the future.
&2Eye of Ender&f is needed to find and activate the portal in &5The End&f.
Time to go to the End
Ingredient for crafting a shulker box.
After slaying my first Dragon, the world has changed and now a strange new resource has begun to appear in it - &6Chlorophite&r.
I need a blacksmith's table to improve my equipment.
sacred_logistics.686a5f68a3da8ab9.title: &bUnnatural beings
sacred_logistics.49438bbeec9da5b5.title: &bUseful Stuff
sacred_logistics.6953150a66c1136b.quests: Reinforced bricks are used to create various blocks and items.
Reinforced Bricks
The pressure chamber is one of the most important devices in this mod. With it, you will create various items to advance through this mod!
Pressure Chamber
With the help of an air compressor, you can generate compressed air by burning fuel, the main source of ‘energy’ in this mod!
Pressure tubes can be used to transfer compressed air to various mechanisms.
With a pneumatic wrench, you can deconstruct blocks from this mod, close/open pipes, etc.
With the help of a thermopneumatic processing unit you can convert some liquids into others.
Plastic sheets can be obtained by leaving the fluid in the world. Plastic itself is used in many crafts in this build.
Plastic Sheets
You can obtain PCBs using the etching tank. To do this, fill the tank with acid and insert blank PCBs.
You can use the assembly controller to control other assembly machines.
You can program drones using the programmer.
A regular drone that can be programmed to perform almost any action.
With the help of a programming controller, you can replace drones. Most often used for large-scale projects, such as quarries!
The logistics drone performs logistics tasks.
The harvesting drone collects any fully grown plants.
The guard drone can protect the territory from hostile mobs.
The collector drone collects various items within its range.
An advanced version of an air compressor.
With the help of an electrostatic compressor, you can generate compressed air by striking the mechanism itself with lightning, which is very difficult to do!
A liquid compressor can be used to generate compressed air by burning various fuel liquids.
An advanced version of a liquid compressor.
A flax compressor can be used to generate compressed air by converting Forge Energy.
With the thermal compressor, you can generate compressed air by using temperature differences.
An advanced version of a pressure tube. (As if it's not self explanatory.)
An air canister can be refilled with compressed air at a refueling station.
An improved version of an air canister.
Very nutritious and delicious bread, be sure to try it!
The vortex cannon can shoot streams of air. They can do certain actions, such as shearing animals.
The GPS marker saves coordinates in the world. Use it in various devices from this mod, such as the programmer and the air cannon.
With the air cannon, you can throw objects into the air. You need a GPS marker for it to work.
Very tasty food, be sure to try it!
With a spawner extractor, you can extract the spawner core from a spawner. But in a very interesting way...
With an empty spawner, you can create a pressurized spawner.
With a pressurized spawner, you can spawn mobs using compressed air while ignoring the light level!
The spawner core can be placed in a pressurized spawner to spawn mobs inside that core.
The huge fluid tank allows you to store up to 512 buckets of any fluid.
sacred_logistics.6953150a66c1136b.title: &bUnder Pressure
sacred_logistics.160173843a9271b6.quests: The thing I've been searching for this entire time is now within reach...
sacred_logistics.160173843a9271b6.title: &bThe Finale...
